mnemonics.title: Hierarchical Clustering
mnemonics.content: H - Hierarchy of clusters, I - Identify relationships, E - Evaluate clusters, R - Repeat process, A - Agglomerative or divisive, R - Represent clusters, C - Cluster analysis, H - Handle outliers, I - Interpret results, C - Compare clusters

acronyms.usage: A type of hierarchical clustering that merges clusters based on the minimum distance between points.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a tree-like structure that represents the hierarchy of clusters.

analogies.analogy: Imagine a library where books are organized into categories, and each category is further divided into subcategories.
